title: NASA Climate Kids: Greenhouse Effect
description: A NASA Climate Kids source card about greenhouse gases, warming, and Earth energy balance.
license: Public Domain / NASA Media Usage Guidelines

pages.text: NASA Climate Kids introduces the greenhouse effect by explaining how gases in the atmosphere affect heat and Earth temperature.
Use this source before more technical climate readings so students have a concrete model for energy entering, leaving, and being trapped by the atmosphere.
NASA materials are generally public domain as U.S. government work, but some images, partner resources, and logos have separate usage rules. Check item-level rights.
